name: ExtensionNutritionIntake_DerivedFrom
title: R5: Additional supporting information (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `NutritionIntake.derivedFrom` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`NutritionIntake.derivedFrom` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Resource)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `NutritionIntake.derivedFrom` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Resource)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `NutritionIntake.derivedFrom` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `NutritionIntake` is not mapped.
Element `NutritionIntake.derivedFrom` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `NutritionIntake.derivedFrom` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `NutritionIntake` is not mapped.
Element `NutritionIntake.derivedFrom` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
Likely references would be to AllergyIntolerance,  Observation or QuestionnaireAnswers.

element.definition: Allows linking the NutritionIntake to the underlying NutritionOrder, or to other information, such as AllergyIntolerance, that supports or is used to derive the NutritionIntake.
element.comment: Likely references would be to AllergyIntolerance,  Observation or QuestionnaireAnswers.
